race.comment: JELLICIOUS (1) talented mare who looks ready to go first-up with the two trials. Nailed late when second to Weeping Woman over 1200m at Kembla Grange in F&M BM78 class last November. That from looks strong enough for this with Grima's 3kg claim. BEAU BANDIT (6) up sharply in class with a courageous on-pace fourth over 1200m at Gosford in the Provincial Mid Champs. A repeat effort will see him hard to catch. LOS PADRES (5) had no luck at his last two runs from wide gates. Snagged back and launched late with a close-up fifth over 1175m at Albury. Maps well and gets his chance at the good odds. SILENCIO PORFAVOR (9) progressing well in easier company and drops in weight with the key jockey change. Gripped on with the 60.5kg for a narrow third over 1100m at Gosford. Can measure up here.
race.rail_position: 8m from 1000m to Winning post and 6m the remainder. (Pent: 5.55)
